description_blocks: 3mm Reflective Niteline accessory cord is ideal for a multitude of uses. Nylon core strands with solution dyed polyester sheath encompasses a single retroreflective strand for superior visibility in low light or night applications. Perfect for lightweight uses, stringing tarps, trail or hazard marking. Manufactured in the U.S.A.Available in:50ft and 100m Lengths in Black, Yellow, Blue, Orange, and Red,Elongation:@ 300 lbf = 12.8%Diameter:3mmGrams Per Meter:6.6Tensile Strength:500 lbf (2.2 kN)

3mm Reflective Niteline accessory cord is ideal for a multitude of uses. Nylon core strands with solution dyed polyester sheath encompasses a single retroreflective strand for superior visibility in low light or night applications. Perfect for lightweight uses, stringing tarps, trail or hazard marking. Manufactured in the U.S.A.

json_ld_data.name: 3mm Niteline™ Reflective Cord
json_ld_data.description:
3mm Reflective Niteline accessory cord is ideal for a multitude of uses. Nylon core strands with solution dyed polyester sheath encompasses a single retroreflective strand for superior visibility in low light or night applications. Perfect for lightweight uses, stringing tarps, trail or hazard marking. Manufactured in the U.S.A.

Available in:
50ft and 100m Lengths in Black, Yellow, Blue, Orange, and Red,&nbsp;

Elongation:
@ 300 lbf = 12.8%

Diameter:&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;3mm
Grams Per Meter:&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;6.6
Tensile Strength:&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;500 lbf (2.2 kN)
